violations.text: Inspector observed a customer with a dog. PIC informed that only service animals are allowed in the store. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the retail and back storage areas, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves and retail cooler vents have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Inspector observed the refuse area to have a heavy accumulation of garbage, leaf litter, and cardboard boxes. Area must be cleaned and maintained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The floors (especially the under the retail shelves) throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The water bubbler in the back storage area is in poor repair. Inspector observed a leak. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back storage, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Inspector observed the floors and shelving throughout facility to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
The men's toilet system is in poor reapir. Liquid waste expelled when unit is flushed. Service needed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
Inspector observed the refuse area to have a heavy accumulation of garbage, unused items and cardboard boxes. Area must be cleaned and maintained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
